generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.example.org/base"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab"

instance StyrofoamInsulatedBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box with volume 0.03 m³"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the physical controller"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214 × 214 × 3 mm) for heating the incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) for air circulation"
]

instance InsideTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor inside the box (first sensor)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted
]

instance InsideTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor inside the box (second sensor)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted
]

instance OutsideTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 temperature sensor outside the box",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutsideTemperatureSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system environment containing all physical components",
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedBox, Heatbed, Fan, InsideTemperatureSensor1, InsideTemperatureSensor2, OutsideTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply
]

instance InsideTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InsideTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideTemperatureSensor2
]

instance OutsideTemperatureSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutsideTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedCommandDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Command data for heatbed"
]

instance FanCommandDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Command data for fan"
]

instance ExperimentalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Experimental temperature data used for calibration of thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideTemperatureSensor1DataTransmitted, InsideTemperatureSensor2DataTransmitted, OutsideTemperatureSensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyPackage
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model A with two parameters: C_air, G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyPackage
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model B with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyPackage
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance PythonScipyPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus communication protocol for temperature sensor communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionResult
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and optimal performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolation, PerformanceDeviation
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection for system components",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation of the thermal system",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimate
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of thermal regulation based on simulation results",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAdjustmentAction, PerformanceAdjustmentAction
]

instance SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected during monitoring"
]

instance PerformanceDeviation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance deviation detected during monitoring"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in system components"
]

instance SystemStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the thermal system"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models"
]

instance SafetyAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust physical operations for safety",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust physical operations for performance",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent from the digital twin via RabbitMQ to the controller, which executes them through the low-level driver to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi connecting the controller (physical side), low-level driver, and digital twin components, with information flow between physical and virtual layers through RabbitMQ topics."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by testing Assumption 1 (temperature uniformity) using multiple sensors, and calibration via residual error minimization between predicted and experimental data trajectories."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "DT technical connection uses RabbitMQ as the communication broker between physical and virtual components, with no specific protocol details provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and digital twin components hosted on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with all software deployed on-premises."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, but specific details on cybersecurity or human safety risks from remote operations are not provided."
]
